n: Book 2, Chapter 2: Boromir, Son of Gondor

steps.t: Boromir is to the north-east, in Tharbad, taking stock of the situation and planning his next steps.
In his haste to escape, the Orc-thief tried to empty the stolen pack of some of its contents, which are now scattered to the west of Boromir's positio…
Boromir is to the east, in Tharbad, taking stock of the situation and planning his next steps.
Boromir has agreed to return with you to meet your companions while he decides his next course.
Meneldir stares at Boromir with suspicion, his eyes narrowed.
